{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304534476DF12F646DB2E56FF04"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616689567010390809","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"十分的好看，简直就是越看越上头。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773401420,"group_id":"7572811604710919230","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一起观鸟吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9cFb/2av/nwWTN/PZ3Hx2FG+vezK9GTsY8FDzhoBBfs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b4947c8242a345a98d392712c7f65017~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797119&x-signature=8A7SBSzZwr4oN4tlVhiIjGaUu%2FM%3D","user_id":"2209337377818764","user_name":"小鸟向阳开"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2209337377818764","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572811604710919230","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+灵异+中式恐怖+规则怪谈】
法医晏折星因一具腐败男尸被拉入门后世界。这里每扇门都是一个独立恐怖副本。
他遇到了陈饱。一个满嘴跑火车，自称走遍名山拜过诸派的胖子。
两人结成同盟，在门后世界挣扎求生。
门内，鬼由执念而生，遵循固定规律，每扇门都是一场关于人性恐惧与宿命的豪赌。
而当他终于活着走出副本，却发现，门后的恐怖，早已渗透进现实。
十岁前的记忆一片空白，手下的法医助理也遭遇了同样的门，一个自称句号的存在在梦里等他。
门后世界没有什么不可能。
一扇扇门，一次次死里逃生。在无限的恐怖循环里，寻找一个答案——
我是谁？
